content.title: Angelo EDZ Portfolio Website
content.description: This is a personal portfolio website for Angelo EDZ, a Software Engineer. The project serves as an online resume and showcase of technical skills, featuring project demonstrations, experience timeline, and professional background. It provides visitors with a comprehensive view of the developer's capabilities and completed work across multiple technologies and domains.
content.role: I developed a complete Vue.js 3 portfolio website from scratch, implementing a modular component architecture with Vuex state management for project data. I created multiple reusable sections including hero animation, project showcase with filtering, experience timeline, skills display, and contact functionality. I integrated Simple Icons for technology stack visualization and implemented responsive design with custom CSS animations and typing effects.

achievements: Successfully deployed a professional portfolio website showcasing 9+ completed projects
Implemented dynamic project filtering by category (Frontend, Backend, Terminal, Scripting, Mobile)
Created engaging user experience with typing animations and smooth transitions
Established scalable codebase with proper testing setup and deployment pipeline
Built comprehensive personal brand presence with integrated contact and CV download functionality

screenshots: Main portfolio homepage with hero section
Project showcase grid with technology icons
